title: Fat Mobs
body:
**_Optifine or EMF Required_**

This resourcepack makes your mobs **FAT**!


![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2078f131f658233d0261c75f792a488630355cc_0.webp)

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1490c48984f45e789689a9c846e7d7f62d92d76_0.webp)

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cab80bcb21fdbeb187d40660cc7812b3b19cce8_0.webp)

**Every mob is remodeled except:**

Bees

Slime and Magma cube

Guardian and Elder Guardian

Pufferfish


_Because they are already fat_

Also available on **[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fat-mobs)** and **[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fat-mobs/)**
